title: ablx.live registry entry
description: One published Ableton Live Extension (.ablx). One file per extension in store/registry/extensions/<slug>.json.

homepageUrl.description: The author's own page for the extension (repo or product page).

downloadUrl.description: Where the .ablx can actually be obtained (releases page or direct asset).

lastUpdated.description: ISO date of last known release/update.

confidence.description: verified = a concrete download location was confirmed by a maintainer. listed = directory entry pending link verification.
